Description:
Receive SVG from designer/Radiant Iconography
Optimize icon using the “ImageOptim” app (free)
https://imageoptim.com/mac
Edit icon in code and remove the “fill” property

Rename icon using the paradigm
“rd-icon-[objective-icon-name]“ 
Objective icon name should be objective and should be detached from the feature as much as possible to be reusable in multiple components
Ex: Upvote icon. Instead of naming them “rd-icon-upvote”, try to name them “rd-icon-arrow-up” instead

Move icon to ‘thoughtspot/js/ts-packages/radiant-styles/resources/img/rd-icons’
Add new icon ID in ‘thoughtspot/js/ts-packages/radiant-react/src/icon/icon-constants.ts’ 
Ex: If the icon is “rd-icon-arrow-up”, add “ARROW_UP = ‘arrow-up’” to the IconID enum object

In terminal:
Go to the directory `thoughtspot/js/ts-packages/radiant-styles/`, run `npm run install`
In the directory ‘thoughtspot/js/ts-packages/radiant-react/‘, run ‘npm run postinstall’, 
If you’d like to double check, run `npm run storybook` and see the changes in storybook. Otherwise skip this step
Then run ‘npm run test:unit -- -u’ to update snapshot test
Check in and have radiant review your code
